headline: Electric Vehicles Update - Real Stories Drive Broader Market Adoption Across America
summary: Electric vehicle (EV) adoption in the United States is expanding beyond early adopters and coastal markets, finding its place in the everyday lives of Americans nationwide. Veloz, a nonprofit organization, has launched the "Real Stories" hub on ElectricForAll.org to capture this shift, showcasing diverse first-person experiences of EV owners from various regions. The platform offers insights into how EVs are integrated into different lifestyles, from school drop-offs to long-distance travel,...

headline: What Toyota’s Earnings Mean for Tesla
summary: Toyota Motor  stock was falling after earnings, but Tesla isn’t really a car company anymore—and its shares are rising.  Toyota  Motor reported fiscal year 2026 earnings and provided an outlook for fiscal year 2027.  Tesla stock didn’t seem to be affected, but Toyota investors reacted with caution.

content.title: What Toyota’s Earnings Mean for Tesla
content.summary: Toyota Motor  stock was falling after earnings, but Tesla isn’t really a car company anymore—and its shares are rising.  Toyota  Motor reported fiscal year 2026 earnings and provided an outlook for fiscal year 2027.  Tesla stock didn’t seem to be affected, but Toyota investors reacted with caution.

headline: Tesla Just Ripped 19% in a Month. Is It Time to Sell in May and Go Away?
summary: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) has staged a sharp rebound. Shares closed at $411.81 on May 7, capping a roughly 19% monthly run that has erased much of the spring drawdown. Even so, the stock is down 8.4% year-to-date, which sets up a familiar tactical question for holders heading into summer: is this the moment to invoke ... Tesla Just Ripped 19% in a Month. Is It Time to Sell in May and Go Away?

content.title: Tesla Just Ripped 19% in a Month. Is It Time to Sell in May and Go Away?
